title: [Let's Do] Beachparty
description: Get your Suncream out! We're going to the beach.
body:
![Beachparty](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/beachparty.png)

Sunny Shores & Tropical Vibes

The laid-back chapter of the Let's Do collection


"Catch the sun. Feel the breeze."


Get your suncream out, we're going to the beach.
Beachparty turns your coastline into a vibrant summer escape. Collect stylish trinkets, mix refreshing drinks and build the ultimate seaside hangout.
Relax. Unwind. Let the tide roll in.
## Beach Essentials
- Trunks, bikinis, sunglasses and more collectibles - Many items grant small bonuses to enhance beach life - Wear your summer style with confidence
Sun out. Shades on.
## Build the Perfect Spot
- Beach chairs in various styles - Tables, palm bar and tropical decor - Perfect building palette for bamboo and coastal builds
Design your own shoreline retreat.
## Drinks & Tunes
- Craft refreshing cocktails - Enjoy laid-back beach vibes - A radio that now works seamlessly without disconnecting everyone
Turn up the volume. Watch the sunset.

Step into the sand.

Raise your glass.

Stay for the sunset.


I wish you lots of fun with this cute little mod.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
